# mountain_rebel
## *Milk: cow; Type: semi-hard, artisan; Texture: compact, creamy*
### More info available [here](https://www.cheese.com/mountain-rebel/)
### This .md header generated by Cheesely, an fbaum project.


This is a (mostly internal) tool to name projects, because I hate doing that. (And I love cheese!)
Feel free to borrow and adapt this for your own use. I'll make it more versatile as I go.
Cheese data from Global Cheese Dataset on Kaggle, available [here](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/umerhaddii/global-cheese-dataset)
